metadata.description: List knowledge base articles with optional filtering by status, audience, type, and category. Returns paginated results with article metadata and document names.

Create a new KB article. Before creating, call GET /api/v1/kb-articles/categories to find available categories. Content can be markdown text or BlockNote JSON. Articles are created in 'draft' status — call POST /api/v1/kb-articles/{id}/publish to make them visible.

examples.name: Create a how-to article with markdown content

body.title: How to Reset User Password
body.content:
# Steps

1. Navigate to Settings > Users
2. Find the user
3. Click Reset Password
4. The user will receive an email with a reset link

examples.name: Create a troubleshooting article for clients

body.title: VPN Connection Issues
body.content:
# Problem

VPN disconnects frequently.

# Solution

1. Check your internet connection
2. Restart the VPN client
3. If the issue persists, contact support

metadata.description: Get a KB article by ID, including its document name and block content data.
Update KB article metadata (title, slug, type, audience, category, status). To update the article body content, use PUT /api/v1/kb-articles/{id}/content instead.
Publish a KB article. Sets status to 'published' and auto-enables client visibility for client/public audience articles.
Update the body content of a KB article. Send content as markdown (default) or BlockNote JSON. Markdown is recommended for AI-generated content.

body.content:
# Updated Article

New content goes here.

metadata.description: Get the body content of a KB article as readable markdown text. Use this to read what an article currently says.
List available categories for KB articles. Call this before creating articles to find the right category_id.
List KB article templates. Templates provide pre-built content structures for different article types.
Create a KB article pre-populated from a ticket's title, description, and resolution. Useful for turning resolved tickets into knowledge base documentation.
